prompt: Full-body fashion editorial shot taken from a slightly low angle, emphasizing dominance and presence. A confident young model sits casually on a sunlit concrete ledge, legs slightly apart, one arm resting on the knee, the other relaxed. The model looks straight into the camera with a calm, commanding expression. Wearing a light denim jacket over a plain white t-shirt, neutral-toned shorts, bright statement socks, and modern sneakers. Clean, minimal styling.
